name: Fresh Tomato, Bacon and Onion Fettucine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the fettuccine to desired doneness as directed on the package. Drain and keep warm.
2. In a separate medium skillet, cook the bacon until crisp. Remove the cooked bacon and drain on paper towels. Reserve 1 tablespoon of drippings in the skillet.
3. Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until it becomes crisp-tender.
4. Crumble the cooked bacon into the skillet with the onion.
5. Add the chopped tomato and basil (either fresh or dried) to the skillet.
6. Cook just until everything is heated through.
7. Immediately toss the mixture with the cooked fettuccine.
8. This recipe serves 4 side dishes or 2 main dishes.
